name: Windwitch Chimes
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＷＷ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ウィンド・ウィッチ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>鈴</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>すず</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>音</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おと</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Bell Chime of the Wind Witch
desc: Target 1 "Windwitch" monster you control; Special Summon 1 "Windwitch" monster with a different name from your Deck in Defense Position. You can only activate 1 "Windwitch Chimes" per turn. You cannot Special Summon monsters the turn you activate this card, except WIND monsters.
eff: Target 1 "Windwitch" monster you control; Special Summon 1 "Windwitch" monster with a different name from your Deck in Defense Position. You can only activate 1 "Windwitch Chimes" per turn. You cannot Special Summon monsters the turn you activate this card, except WIND monsters.

summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to Attribute specific monsters
